title: Love on the Riviera
writer: Sergio Amidei, Edoardo Anton, René Barjavel
actors: Alberto Sordi, Michèle Morgan, Marcello Mastroianni
plot: It is Summer. It is the right time for love, especially in a most romantic place as Golfo del Tigullio. Different stories: Dorina looking for a rich lover; Clara who takes a fancy to the young Walter while her daughter Lina tries ...
